text.message: Too much wood so it's pretty dead
Wheat on wheat port when I produce plenty of wheat already
I dont get the block red
I don't think strong is the right word
The block is definitely the 9 brick
A guy with a city going for road with coordinated 9s is strong
Compared to the most common resource on 5 dots
Guess he's probably just given up and wants the game to end asap
Since by blocking me it stops me buying devs so I cant block red to slow down the game
nope you just have best port and best production
Will be out of settles as well
You say as you have a city
Guess what, I dont produce roads or settles
black dont try to fool us
blue is dangerous dont be mistaken
Notice how I'm the one without a city here?
Notice how the 2 peoplpe who produce the most road mats both have cities?
The only fooling is you fooling yourself
Ever heard of a non block?
I mean, orange is already robbing me all game, it's blue vs red. If you're blocking me you're just wasting your knight and hurting yourself
Orange being salt just because I took the best spot
Why are you even taking it personally
If you're this upset you could just quite the game
Better to not feed into your anger
what do you mean i'm going for the win here
Which is why you use a robber on me once I'm already blocked
And don't block the obvious best block spot
can you help me get road ?
Nice, you saw me trading my only resource and deduced I must have mono because of it
I'm pointing out your excellent deduction
I sense sarcasm in the previous message
It's cause if my hand is 1 sheep and 2 wheat and I try to trade 1 sheep for 1 ore, that's just a reasonable play
There's 0 reason to think I'd have mono because of that
need to pop to get army
I can give wood if that helps
If you rob from red it'd be easier for you to get army
When he's at 9, with a dev, and open settle
Red must have rb or mono
